name: cli-external-orchestration
description: Parent hub for external CLI dispatch: routes to two workflow modes, cli-opencode (OpenCode CLI orchestrator: external dispatch, in-OpenCode parallel sessions, cross-AI handback) and cli-claude-code (Claude Code CLI executor: Anthropic-backed reasoning, edits, reviews, structured cross-AI handoff), through mode-registry.json and hub-router.json. The advisor sees one hub identity; workflowMode selects the packet. Both modes orchestrate a CLI binary and their dispatched writes land in this repo's workspace, so neither is a transport packet.
trigger_examples: Delegate this to OpenCode for a full-runtime dispatch
Use cli-claude-code to get an Anthropic-backed second opinion
Run this task through opencode run with the deepseek provider
